note: Host-maintained truth for grading pick-ems. Fill values in as outcomes are known; nulls are 'not graded yet'. q8 = real final group order per letter. q3a/q3b = the two losing semifinalists (order-agnostic). q4 is an ARRAY here on purpose — all three host nations (Mexico, Canada, USA) were eliminated in the Round of 16, a genuine 3-way tie for furthest-advancing host, so anyone who picked any of the three is correct (see scoring.js keyIncludes/keyIsGraded).
